title: anemonastrum obtusilobum subsp. nepalense
intro: Anemonastrum obtusilobum subsp. nepalense is a plant species belonging to the Anemonastrum genus, also known as the Himalayan thimbleberry or Nepalese Himalayan thimbleberry, characterized by its distinctive thimble-shaped fruit. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Anemonastrum obtusilobum subsp. nepalense include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate cold and flu symptoms, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, or infusions, which are consumed for their therapeutic properties.
